N

newInstance(boolean, String, String) - Static method in class com.example.eventsapp.ExploreFilterBottomSheet
Creates a new instance with the current filter state pre-populated so that re-opening the sheet reflects any previously chosen filters.
newInstance(Event) - Static method in class com.example.eventsapp.EventDialogFragment
Creates a new instance of EventDialogFragment for editing an existing event.
newInstance(Users) - Static method in class com.example.eventsapp.AdminUserDetailBottomSheet
Creates a new instance of this bottom sheet pre-populated with the given user.
newInstance(String) - Static method in class com.example.eventsapp.OrganizerCancelledFragment
Creates a new instance pre-configured with the target event ID.
newInstance(String) - Static method in class com.example.eventsapp.OrganizerEnrolledFragment
Creates a new instance with the given event ID pre-loaded as an argument.
NOT_SELECTED - Enum constant in enum class com.example.eventsapp.UserNotification.Type
Notification that the user was not selected in the lottery.
NotificationItem - Class in com.example.eventsapp
Represents a notification sent to a user in the event application.
NotificationItem() - Constructor for class com.example.eventsapp.NotificationItem
No-argument constructor required for Firestore deserialization.
NotificationItem(String, String, String, String, String, boolean) - Constructor for class com.example.eventsapp.NotificationItem
Constructs a NotificationItem with full details.
NotificationItem(String, String, String, String, String, boolean, String) - Constructor for class com.example.eventsapp.NotificationItem
Constructs a NotificationItem with full details including groupId.
NotificationLogItem - Class in com.example.eventsapp
POJO representing a document in the global notification_logs Firestore collection.
NotificationLogItem() - Constructor for class com.example.eventsapp.NotificationLogItem
No-argument constructor required for Firestore deserialization.
NotificationLogItem(String, String, String, String, String, String, String, Timestamp, List<Map<String, String>>) - Constructor for class com.example.eventsapp.NotificationLogItem
Constructs a fully populated NotificationLogItem.
notifyChosenFromWaitlist(Users, String) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.LotteryNotificationController
Notifies a user that they have been selected from the waitlist for an event.
notifyNotChosenFromWaitlist(Users, String) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.LotteryNotificationController
Notifies a user that they were not selected from the waitlist for an event.
notifyWaitlisted(Users, String) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.LotteryNotificationController
Notifies a user that they have been placed on the waitlist for an event.
